Stop.description: Back up session transcript to raw/transcripts/

UserPromptSubmit.description: Back up session transcript on each user message

PreToolUse.command: echo 'BLOCKED: Use hex-events policies at ~/.hex-events/policies/*.yaml — never CronCreate. See CLAUDE.md hex-events section.' >&2; exit 2
PreToolUse.description: Prevent CronCreate tool use — use hex-events instead

PreToolUse.command: echo 'BLOCKED: Use hex-events policies at ~/.hex-events/policies/*.yaml — never ScheduleWakeup. See CLAUDE.md hex-events section.' >&2; exit 2
